scope.target: Separate semantic analyzer capability from target-repository severity policy
constraints: Do not duplicate standard .NET coding-style diagnostics.
Allow target repositories to override every DBA diagnostic through editorconfig.
non_goals: Selecting one mandatory severity profile for every team

execution_steps: Record the editorconfig overlap audit in the Phase 3 requirement.
Add a target-repository analyzer severity template.
Document build-gate requirements and per-repository overrides.

results.summary: Confirmed that DBA diagnostics cover architecture semantics not expressed by the existing editorconfig, and added a per-diagnostic target-repository severity template.
